bibliography.bibliomixed:
Appalachian Regional Commission (2023) About the Appalachian region.
https://www.arc.gov/about-the-appalachian-region/

Center for Oral Health Research in Appalachia (2020)
https://www.dental.pitt.edu/research/center-oral-health-research-appalachia

Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (2019a) Adverse childhood experiences (ACEs).
https://www.cdc.gov/aces/about/index.html

Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (2019b) Preventing adverse childhood experiences.
https://stacks.cdc.gov/view/cdc/82316

Fornehed MLC, Mixer SJ, Lindley LC (2020) Families’ decision making at end of life in rural Appalachia. J Hosp Palliat Nurs 22(3):188–195 https://doi.org/10.1097/NJH.0000000000000642
PubMed

Fornehed M, Svynarenko R, Keim-Malpass J, Cozad M, Qualls K, Stone W, Lindley L (2022) Comparison between rural and urban Appalachian children in hospice care. South Med J 115(3):192–197. https://doi.org/10.14423/SMJ.0000000000001365
https://doi.org/10.14423/SMJ.0000000000001365
PubMed
PubMedCentral

Hatcher J, Voigts K, Culp-Roche A, Adegboyega A, Scott T (2018) Rural grandparent headed households: a qualitative description. Online J Rural Nurs Health Care 18(1):40–62 https://doi.org/10.14574/ojrnhc.v18i1.486
PubMed
PubMedCentral
Hufford M (2006) Folklore and folklife. In: Abramson R, Haskell J (eds) Encyclopedia of Appapachia. The University of Tennessee Press, Knoxville, pp 844–909

March of Dimes (2020) Neonatal abstinence syndrome (NAS)
https://www.marchofdimes.org/complications/neonatal-abstinence-syndrome-(nas).aspx

Mixer SJ, Fornehed MLC (2021) People of Appalachian heritage. In: Purnell LD, Fenkyl EA (eds) Textbook for transcultural health care: a population approach. Cultural competence concepts in nursing care, 5th edn. Springer, Cham

Mixer SJ, Fornehed ML, Varney J, Lindley LC (2014) Culturally congruent end-of-life care for rural Appalachian people and their families. J Hosp Palliat Nurs 16(8):526–535. https://doi.org/10.1097/NJH.0000000000000114
https://doi.org/10.1097/NJH.0000000000000114
PubMed
PubMedCentral

National Alliance on Mental Illness [NAMI] (2018) Mental health by the numbers. Accessed 20 Jun 2024
https://www.nami.org/Learn-More/Mental-Health-By-the-Numbers

National Institute on Drug Abuse [NIDA] (2018a) Drugs, brains, and behavior: the science of addiction.
https://www.drugabuse.gov/publications/drugs-brains-behavior-science-addiction/drug-misuse-addiction

National Institute on Drug Abuse [NIDA] (2018b) Pregnant women in Appalachia face barriers to opiod treatment.
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/29949454/

Tennessee Department of Health (2021) Neonatal abstinence syndrome surveillance summary week 35: August 29–September 04, 2021.
https://www.tn.gov/health/health-program-areas/fhw/neonatal-abstinence-syndrome-/data-and-reports.html

U. S. Department of Health and Human Services (USDHHS) (2020a) Administration shortage designation advisor.
https://datawarehouse.hrsa.gov/tools/analyzers/hpsafind.aspx

U. S. Department of Health and Human Services (USDHHS) (2020b) Loan repayment.
https://nhsc.hrsa.gov/loan-repayment/nhsc-loan-repayment-program

Webb A (2013) African Americans in Appalachia. Accessed 26 Jan 2020
https://oxfordaasc.com/page/2527

Yao N, Hector EA, Anderson R, Balkrishnan R (2017) Cancer dispartities in rural Appalachia: incidence, early detection and survivorship. J Rural Health 33:375–381 https://doi.org/10.1111/jrh.12213
PubMed
